Container.Name: udemy-downloader
Container.Overview: Downloads Udemy courses including Widevine DRM-protected content. Requires a Widevine L3 .wvd device file.
Container.Requires: A Widevine L3 .wvd device file placed in the wvkeys host path.

Config.Name: Course URL
Config.Description: Full Udemy course URL. Example: https://www.udemy.com/course/my-course/

Config.Name: Bearer Token
Config.Description: Udemy API bearer token. Find in browser DevTools → Network → any api-2.0 request → Authorization header.

Config.Name: Use Cookies
Config.Description: Set to true to authenticate via cookies.txt instead of a bearer token (for enterprise portals).

Config.Name: Output Directory
Config.Description: Where downloaded course files will be saved.

Config.Name: WVD Keys Directory
Config.Description: Folder containing one or more Widevine .wvd device files.

Config.Name: Keyfile (JSON)
Config.Description: JSON file used to cache Widevine keys. Create an empty one with: echo '{}' > keyfile.json

Config.Name: Cookies File
Config.Description: Netscape-format cookies file. Required only when Use Cookies is true.

Config.Name: Quality
Config.Description: Video quality in pixels. Example: 1080, 720, 480. Leave blank for best available.

Config.Name: Caption Language
Config.Description: Caption language code. Example: en, es, fr, all. Default: en.

Config.Name: Download Captions
Config.Description: Set to true to download subtitles.

Config.Name: Download Assets
Config.Description: Set to true to download lecture assets (PDFs, source code, etc.).

Config.Name: Download Quizzes
Config.Description: Set to true to download quizzes as HTML files.

Config.Name: Use MKV
Config.Description: Set to true to output MKV files with subtitle tracks embedded.

Config.Name: Keep Subtitles
Config.Description: Set to true to also save subtitle files alongside the video.

Config.Name: Keep VTT
Config.Description: Set to true to keep original .vtt files in addition to .srt.

Config.Name: Skip Lectures
Config.Description: Set to true to skip video downloads (e.g. to grab captions only).

Config.Name: Skip HLS
Config.Description: Set to true to skip HLS streams. Faster course fetching but may miss 1080p on non-DRM lectures.

Config.Name: Chapter
Config.Description: Download specific chapters only. Example: 1, 1,3-5, 2-4. Leave blank for all.

Config.Name: Parallel Lectures
Config.Description: Number of lectures to download in parallel per chapter (1–5).

Config.Name: Concurrent Downloads
Config.Description: Number of segment download threads per lecture (1–30).

Config.Name: Save to File
Config.Description: Set to true to cache the course structure to disk on first run.

Config.Name: Load from File
Config.Description: Set to true to load course structure from cache instead of fetching from Udemy.

Config.Name: Log Level
Config.Description: Logging verbosity: DEBUG, INFO, WARNING, ERROR, CRITICAL.
